commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Gateway exec preflight analyzer/refusal for known-heavy validation commands, targeted classifier/execution tests, and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level for the unsafe acceptance path: current main has no heavy-command preflight before local gateway exec proceeds toward host execution. No for the full OOM/restart incident, because this review did not live-reproduce Gateway memory pressure or a host hang.
commands.review_followup: This draft external PR needs contributor-supplied real Gateway proof plus maintainer/security judgment on the guard, wrapper trust, systemd-run parsing, docs, and emergency bypass before repair or merge.
